TOKENOMICS

Desserts like pie are for weaklings, but we still made this pie chart to show you that we’re dead serious about GigaChadGPT.

70%

Presale: This allows early investors to get in on the ground floor and secure their chad status.

15%

Treasury, development and marketing: This is where the real action happens. We use these funds to fuel the project's growth, develop new features, and market the shit out of it.

10%

Liquidity: This ensures there's enough liquidity in the market for smooth trading and make sure that the launch price is bigger than the presale price.

5%

Team: Team tokens are locked. This shows our commitment to the project and ensures that the team is fully invested in its success. No weak-ass rug pulls here, beta.

0%

Buy & Sell Tax: Buy and sell taxes are just another way for betas to control your hard-earned gains. It's a total buzzkill for alpha investors, that’s why taxes on $GIGA are 0%.

ROADMAP

The Road To Success With GigaChadGPT

G

Getting Started (Q4-23)

Development: I’m alive which means the development succeeded. But we won’t stop here. We’ll create more AI solutions where I can flourish.

Community: build a community of chads to rule over the betas.

P

Pursuit Of Success (Q1-24)

Launch: list the token on major decentralized exchanges to ensure maximum liquidity and accessibility.

MORE Marketing: implement a robust marketing strategy to continuously promote the GigaChadGPT token and increase its visibility.

T

The Future (Q1-24)

The future is simple. We will continuously innovate and improve the GigaChadGPT token to stay ahead of the beta competition. Establish GigaChadGPT as the ultimate symbol of dominance in the crypto world, making all other tokens bow down to its alpha power.

HOW TO BUY $GIGA

The presale has successfully SOLD OUT!
But don't worry, you can buy $GIGA on PancakeSwap on Feb 1st.

1

Load up on some BNB

You can buy $GIGA on PancakeSwap with BNB. So load up your wallet like MetaMask or TrustWallet with some BNB.

2

Visit PancakeSwap

Visit PancakeSwap Here. Make sure you are buying the real $GIGA, the contract address is 0x682F8fDdfec6EBdf6c7bf1C0eeC276B37a647D59.

3

Select Amount & Buy

Select the amount of $GIGA you want to buy in BNB, and click "SWAP".

4

Approve transaction & enjoy your $GIGA

Approve the transaction in your wallet and wait for it to confirm. That's it, you are now an Alpha!

FAQ

Stupid questions do exist but here you go anyway.

What is GigaChadGPT?
GigaChadGPT is a memecoin combined with AI. You can talk to the GigaChadGPT AI chatbot on the website or via Telegram. This project aims to create the most alpha chatbot on the internet. Ask GigaChadGPT anything, but please be aware it may turn your beta ass into an alpha.
What are the tokenomics of GigaChadGPT?
$GIGA is an BEP20 token with a total supply of 100,000,000. 70% of the tokens will be sold in the presale. 15% goes to treasury, development and marketing. 10% of the tokens are reserved for liquidity. 5% are vested team tokens. There is no buy or sell tax on $GIGA.
What is the official website of GigaChadGPT?
The only official website of GigaChadGPT is https://gigachadgpt.io. Any other website claiming to be GigaChadGPT is a scam.
What are the official social channels of GigaChadGPT?
Our Twitter/X is https://twitter.com/GigaChadGPT_io and our only official Telegram channel can be found at https://t.me/GigaChadGPTOfficial.
When does the presale start and end?
The presale started November 15th, 2023, and ended January 26, 2024. The token will launch on February 1st, 2024. The presale sold out early on January 16!
How many phases does the presale have?
The presale has 5 phases. The start date and prices can be found here.
What is the hardcap of the presale?
GigaChadGPT will aim to raise $250k.
On what chain/network will $GIGA launch?
$GIGA will launch on the Binance Smart Chain (BSC/BEP20) on Feb 1st.
I bought the $GIGA presale. How do I receive my tokens?
Your tokens will be automatically airdropped into your wallet on Feb 1st.
Where can I find the whitepaper?
You can find the whitepaper of GigaChadGPT here.
How do I buy $GIGA?
The presale has finished. You can buy $GIGA on PancakeSwap on Feb 1st.
